title: astragalus suffruticosus
intro: Astragalus suffruticosus, also known as low-growing milk vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus suffruticosus include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as fatigue, colds, and flu. Astragalus suffruticosus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
